sigWerErrors.reason: 'không phải' means 'not', so deleting 'không' reverses the meaning of the sentence.
'chấm' is used to indicate a dot in an email address; omitting it makes the email address incorrect.
Inserting 'gmail' changes the domain of the email address, resulting in an incorrect email.
